description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade is defined by a large covered porch supported by columns, flanked by two prominent gabled sections with symmetrical windows. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof. Multiple window arrangements are visible on all sides, with a mix of single and paired windows, and a large garage opening is present on one side. The rear of the house showcases a partially open gable with decorative trusses and additional windows, suggesting a spacious interior. The overall design blends traditional and modern ranch-style elements, emphasizing horizontal lines and a welcoming entryway.
description: A large, single-story house with a complex dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, a prominent front porch, and multiple symmetrical windows. The design combines traditional and modern ranch-style features with a spacious, inviting layout.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the wide covered porch, central entryway, and symmetrical gabled sections with windows on either side.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the garage opening, a small covered entry, and the layered complexity of the roof structure.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a decorative open gable with exposed trusses, additional windows, and the extended wings of the house.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a series of evenly spaced windows and the continuation of the multi-gabled roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a prominent main door flanked by windows.
